task: Run a parallel code-review council and synthesize a final verdict.

nodes.name: security_review
nodes.prompt: Review the code for vulnerabilities and severity.

nodes.name: performance_review
nodes.prompt: Review the code for bottlenecks and optimization opportunities.

nodes.name: maintainability_review
nodes.prompt: Review the code for clarity, structure, and maintainability.

nodes.name: synthesize_verdict
nodes.prompt: Synthesize the three reviews into priority issues and concrete fixes.
